description: Cancer surgical procedures performed on the patient.

items.name: Surgery Type
items.valid_codes: lobectomy, wedge_resection, segmentectomy, pneumonectomy, thymectomy, pleurectomy_decortication, extrapleural_pneumonectomy

items.name: Surgery Site
items.description: Anatomical site of surgery (e.g., RUL, RML, RLL, LUL, LLL, lingula, left_lung, thymus)

items.name: Surgery Date
items.description: Date of surgery, as specific as is known. Format YYYY-MM-DD when possible.
